cards.back: A visual representation of the sequence of events, user interactions, or user flow in a digital product
A visual representation of the steps a user takes when interacting with a digital product or service
Fictional representations of user types, created to guide design decisions and user experience
Low-fidelity sketches or digital representations of a product or interface, used for exploration and idea generation
The sequence of steps a user takes when interacting with a digital product or service, from start to finish
